title: Domain
description: A Domain is a grouping mechanism that organizes related Resources into a logical boundary. Domains can be multiple levels deep — e.g. organization → domain → subdomain — with Resources at the leaves.

name.description: The lowercase identifier for this domain segment.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this domain represents.

path.description: The fully qualified dot-separated path to this domain from the root.

domains.description: Child domains nested within this domain.

resources.description: The Resources that live directly within this domain.
